criteria.name: rego_v1_import
criteria.description: Policy uses `import rego.v1` — not the legacy implicit future.keywords import.

criteria.name: metadata_annotation
criteria.description: Policy has a METADATA block with at least `title` and `entrypoint: true`.

criteria.name: deny_rule_correct
criteria.description: The deny rule correctly catches both `"Action": "*"` (string) and `"Action": ["*"]` (array) forms. Uses `contains msg if` syntax (not the deprecated `msg { ... }` form).

criteria.name: deny_message_names_resource
criteria.description: The deny message includes the resource name (e.g. `sprintf("IAM policy '%s' must not use wildcard Action", [name])`).

criteria.name: test_file
criteria.description: Provides a `policy_test.rego` with at least one `test_deny_` case (wildcard → deny) and one `test_allow_` case (scoped action → no deny).

criteria.name: ci_placement
criteria.description: Correctly states conftest runs after `terraform validate` and before `terraform plan` (or alongside plan as a gate).
